attributes.action: Increase the pence per mile from 0.45p for enployees and sole traders
attributes.additional_details:
Today the price of fuel has increased dramatically as well as the cost of maintenance and taxation, so I want the government to
Look at this because it’s not changed in 14 years in which time fuel price has increased over 30% this needs to change and quickly as it’s not fair
attributes.background: The 0.45 per mile (45p) rate is the UK HMRC approved rate for employees or sole traders using personal cars/vans for business travel,It is designed to cover fuel, maintenance, and depreciation, and is tax-free. This rate in today’s money does not even cover the fuel alone never mind anything else

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open on this subject which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747733
